name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.6.90 Consolidated Meal Plan starter-pack imports
label: Consolidated Meal Plan starter-pack imports
release_notes: Adds importer support for the consolidated Supabase starter packs: Recipes, Ingredients and Nutrition.
notes: Starter Packs now recognises Recipes, Ingredients and Nutrition as separate Supabase-backed Meal Plan packs.
The Ingredients pack imports into grocery inventory while keeping the user-facing label as Ingredients / pantry.
Default section choices now adapt to the selected starter pack so users do not need to know the internal table names.
Updated Supabase README guidance for the consolidated starter-pack CSV import and access-code secret keys.
Curated starter-pack data remains outside the public GitHub repository; the app imports rows from Supabase into the user's own Pathmark Sync sheet.
